data.title: Replace Python-specific tool names in reviewer templates and regenerate agents
data.description:
## Testing Mode
UPDATE

## Description
Edit reviewer-base.md and reviewer-delta-light.md to replace all hardcoded Python tool names with generic language, then regenerate all code reviewer agent files via build-review-agents.sh.

### reviewer-base.md edits:
- Lines 38-42: Replace "Ruff format and ruff check (and mypy) run pre-commit and are already enforced by the hook suite" with "The project's configured linter and type checker run pre-commit and are already enforced by the hook suite". Remove specific tool names (ruff check, mypy) from the enumeration.
- Lines 43-44: Replace "make lint-ruff", "make lint-mypy", "ruff check", "mypy" with "the project's configured lint and type-check commands"
- Lines 196-199 (hygiene category mapping): Replace "Do NOT report ruff/mypy/format violations here — those run pre-commit and are already enforced" with "Do NOT report violations already caught by the project's configured linter, type checker, or formatter here — those run pre-commit and are already enforced"

### reviewer-delta-light.md edits:
- Lines 33-34: Replace "ruff format/check" with "the project's configured linter"
- Lines 98-109 (Linter Suppression Rules section): Replace Python-specific suppression items:
  - Replace "ruff (Python): formatting (E1-E5), import ordering (I), unused imports (F401), and all ruff check rules run pre-commit" with "The project's configured linter: formatting, import ordering, and all configured lint rules run pre-commit. Do not re-flag these."
  - Replace "mypy (Python types): type annotation violations run pre-commit" with "The project's configured type checker: type annotation violations run pre-commit. Do not flag missing type annotations or type mismatches unless they indicate a logic bug."
  - Keep shellcheck entry as-is (it is shell-specific, not Python-specific)

### Regeneration:
Run build-review-agents.sh to regenerate all agent files from the updated templates.

## Files to Modify
- plugins/dso/docs/workflows/prompts/reviewer-base.md (EDIT)
- plugins/dso/docs/workflows/prompts/reviewer-delta-light.md (EDIT)
- plugins/dso/agents/code-reviewer-*.md (REGENERATED via build-review-agents.sh)

## TDD Requirement
The RED test from Task de55-95cd verifies no ruff/mypy terms in generated files and source templates. After these edits + regeneration, that test goes GREEN.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] reviewer-base.md Do Not section (lines 38-44) contains no ruff/mypy/lint-ruff/lint-mypy terms
  Verify: ! awk '/Do NOT report formatting/,/Focus only/' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/workflows/prompts/reviewer-base.md | grep -qi 'ruff\|mypy\|lint-ruff\|lint-mypy'
- [ ] reviewer-base.md contains "configured linter" or "configured lint"
  Verify: grep -q 'configured linter\|configured lint' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/workflows/prompts/reviewer-base.md
- [ ] reviewer-base.md hygiene category (line 196) uses generic language
  Verify: grep 'hygiene' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/workflows/prompts/reviewer-base.md | grep -qi 'configured\|automated'
- [ ] reviewer-delta-light.md Linter Suppression Rules section contains no ruff/mypy terms
  Verify: ! awk '/Linter Suppression Rules/,/^##/' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/workflows/prompts/reviewer-delta-light.md | grep -qi 'ruff\|mypy'
- [ ] reviewer-delta-light.md lines 33-34 contain no ruff terms
  Verify: ! sed -n '33,34p' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/workflows/prompts/reviewer-delta-light.md | grep -qi 'ruff'
- [ ] All generated agent files pass polyglot compliance test
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/docs/test-reviewer-polyglot-compliance.sh
- [ ] commands.lint_ruff and commands.lint_mypy still exist in validate.sh
  Verify: grep -q 'commands.lint_ruff' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh && grep -q 'commands.lint_mypy' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/run-all.sh
